motivation.0: One passage at a time — that's how bands grow.
motivation.1: Small daily reps beat weekend cramming.
motivation.2: You don't have to feel ready; you just have to begin.
motivation.3: Ten focused minutes beat an hour of half-attention.
motivation.4: Progress hides in the sessions you show up for anyway.

targetBand.message: Set a target band so we can tailor recommendations.

examDate.message: Add your exam date to unlock a countdown and an intensified plan.

allDone.title: Today's plan complete!
allDone.description: Come back tomorrow to keep your streak.

examCountdown.days: {count, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} until IELTS

profilePanel.streakEmpty: Finish a task today to start your streak.

empty.heading: Set your exam date to start the readiness track
empty.description: Unlock a 4-step roadmap personalised to your target band and exam date.

goal.title: Set your goal
goal.rationale: Pick a target band and exam date so we can plan around them.

daily_plan.title: Lock in your daily plan
daily_plan.rationale: Aim for ~{min} minutes a day — small steady reps beat weekend cram.

skills.title: Build skills across 4 areas
skills.rationale: {done} of {total} skills at band {target}. Tap a skill to keep going.

mock_test.title: Mock test week
mock_test.rationale: Run timed mocks under exam pressure. {days} days to go.
mock_test.locked_no_date: Set an exam date to unlock this step.
mock_test.past: Exam day has passed. Ready to set a new goal?

warn80.title: You're close to today's AI limit

modal.title: Daily AI limit reached

telegramOnboarding.heading: Connect Telegram
telegramOnboarding.subheading: Get daily vocab in chat — and study together with a group.

step1.title: Link your Telegram account
step1.description: Open the bot in Telegram once to connect your accounts.

step2.title: Use it with a group
step2.description: Add the bot to a Telegram group and send /start there.
